message: 🆘 URGENT HLP: My brother was bitten by a poisonous snake. Admitted in AIIMS Delhi ICU. We need 4 units O NEGATIVE blood IMMEDIATELY to save his life. He is bleeding from nose. Anyone O- plz contact 9871112233. Please share in all NCR groups 🙏🙏
